files_modified: ASSISTANT/SKILLS/WORKFLOW/create-workorder/SKILL.md (Step 3.6 already spec'd; update notes if needed)

risks.title: Lloyd unavailable during create-workorder execution
risks.mitigation: discovery_rag.py already handles LloydUnavailableError and returns fallback_used=true — wiring layer must propagate gracefully, not re-raise

risks.title: coderef-vectors.json age check gives false-positive stale on first use
risks.mitigation: Freshness check uses file mtime; after WO-SOURCE-HEADERS-RESTAMP-001 the vectors should be fresh. Test confirms correct path.

risks.title: RAG server not running when feature flag is ON
risks.mitigation: Pre-flight /coderef-rag-server status check catches this; fallback_used=true if unreachable — workorder continues

risks.title: discovery_rag key collision with existing context.json fields
risks.mitigation: SKILL.md Step 4.5 already specifies discovery_rag as a top-level optional key — no collision possible

candidates.role: source — enrich_with_rag() entry point; complete, no changes needed
spec — Step 3.6 documents the contract; Phase 1 verifies alignment, Phase 2 confirms wiring matches
metadata — reads list must include discovery_rag.py
reference doc — referenced by SKILL.md but not yet created; Phase 2 creates it

dependencies: ASSISTANT/tools/lloyd_client.py — called by discovery_rag.py; must be reachable

CODEREF_LLOYD_DISCOVERY_RAG env var — feature flag; default OFF

decision_records.decision: Override classifier plan_type from light to phased
decision_records.rationale: Task spans ASSISTANT orchestration layer and requires Phase 1 verification before Phase 2 implementation. Phased plan provides a hard stop at Phase 1 for review before any code changes land.

decision_records.decision: No CODEREF-CORE files will be modified
decision_records.rationale: All RAG infrastructure (server, CLI, vector store, Lloyd client) is complete and operational. The gap is 100% in the ASSISTANT orchestration layer (create-workorder skill execution).

decision_records.decision: RAG-DISCOVERY-STEP.md reference doc is in-scope for this workorder
decision_records.rationale: SKILL.md Step 3.6 already references references/RAG-DISCOVERY-STEP.md but the file does not exist. Creating it completes the contract surface and is a natural deliverable of wiring the feature.
